columns.extraction_plan: On page 3, in the Abstract section, extract the sentence "Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone (AAP) previously demonstrated improved survival in STAMPEDE, a multiarm, multistage platform trial in men starting long-term hormone therapy for prostate cancer." and "Standard-of-care (SOC) was androgen deprivation therapy." Also, in the "2.3 Procedures" section, extract "All patients received lifelong ADT using gonadotrophin-releasing hormone (GnRH) agonists, antagonists, or orchidectomy. Patients allocated to the SOC + AAP group were also planned to receive abiraterone (1000 mg daily) with prednisolone (5 mg daily)."
